entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the target crop for genetic analysis

entities.name: PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Basic raw materials for future genetic progress and insurance against unforeseen threats to agricultural production

entities.name: COMPOSITE COLLECTION
entities.description: A broad collection of genetic resources used for tapping global crop-related resources

entities.name: REFERENCE SET
entities.description: A genotype-based subset of a composite collection used for efficient genetic analysis

entities.name: SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers used to detect alleles and analyze genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution and organization of genetic variation within a population

entities.name: DIVERSITY
entities.description: The range of genetic variation within the chickpea collections

entities.name: ALLELIC RICHNESS
entities.description: The number of different alleles present at specific loci

entities.name: KABULI
entities.description: A specific type of chickpea

entities.name: DESI
entities.description: A specific type of chickpea characterized by a higher proportion of rare alleles

entities.name: WILD CICER
entities.description: Wild relatives of the chickpea species

entities.name: MEDITERRANEAN
entities.description: A geographic region from which chickpea accessions were sourced

entities.name: WEST ASIA
entities.description: A geographic region from which chickpea accessions were sourced

entities.name: SOUTH AND SOUTH EAST ASIA
entities.description: A geographic region from which chickpea accessions were sourced

entities.name: AFRICAN REGION
entities.description: A geographic region from which chickpea accessions were sourced

entities.name: NEIGHBOUR-JOINING TREE DIAGRAM
entities.description: A phylogenetic method used to represent genetic diversity

entities.name: ALLELE MINING
entities.description: The process of identifying and extracting useful alleles from germplasm

entities.name: ASSOCIATION GENETICS
entities.description: A method used to link genetic markers to specific traits

entities.name: MAPPING
entities.description: The process of determining the location of genes on a chromosome

entities.name: CLONING
entities.description: The process of isolating and replicating specific genes

entities.name: APPLIED BREEDING
entities.description: The practice of developing elite breeding lines or cultivars

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the crop

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of the crop to thrive in diverse environments
